The main enclosure for the screen as the main base of the monitor.

column1: NT140WHM-N44 LCD display controller driver board
column2: The purpose of this part is to help control what the LCD screen displays. This LCD controller board acts as a translator and bridge between a video source (like a computer, Raspberry Pi, or media player) and an LCD panel. It converts raw video signals into a format that the screen can understand to display images.
